title: Mimi Bunny's Picnic Delivery Dash
description: A polished standalone H5 catch-and-deliver episode bonus game with compact mobile layout, smoother catch timing, fixed final-round delivery and shield transitions, and refined touch feel.

title: Mimi Bubble Pop Parade
description: A standalone mobile-first H5 tap game where Mimi pops matching bubbles on a bold music-stage themed interface with calmer item density and longer round pacing.

title: Mimi Rainbow Hopscotch
description: A standalone mobile-first H5 lane runner where Mimi hops through a chalk-court playground style with polished feel, calmer item density, and longer round pacing.
